title: Visual Intent Routing — template routing gold set (v1)
description: Per-query acceptable-template ground truth for the L1 routing eval (docs/eval-framework-visual-intent-routing-2026-06-15.md). Queries = the ~58-query core eval set (docs/search-eval-set.md). Labels = Claude-annotated from the template capability KB (templates + real inspiration examples, so capability is judged by what each template actually generates, not its name) + human-authored eval notes; pending human review. acceptable_template_ids is a SET (handles multi-valid/high-ambiguity); an empty set is an honest 'no route' for true content gaps, with adjacent-but-wrong templates moved to near_miss_template_ids. Query-source-agnostic: append real user queries in the same shape.

label_legend.ambiguity: low = subject+format both explicit (one route family); medium = subject clear, format implied; high = broad/polysemous, gold is a set
label_legend.acceptable_template_ids: any of these counts as a correct route (top-k hit)
label_legend.primary_template_id: single best route, or null on tie/gap
label_legend.near_miss_template_ids: adjacent templates that look right but are subject/format-mismatched; NOT correct answers (used for diagnostics)

queries.rationale: Bare polysemous noun 'word/vocabulary'; gold is a set of word-card routes. vocabulary is the most general bilingual word-card generator; mbti-animal qualifies via its animal-vocab aliases; species-science is more biology than vocab (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary params [language_pair,topic_name], title 'Bilingual Vocabulary Visual Guide'.

queries.rationale: 'Cartoon' is a bare style word, not a subject; many cartoon-rendered templates are equally valid with no single best route (tie). education-card offers 'cute cartoon style'; mbti-contrast and travel are hand-drawn cartoon styles.
queries.evidence: template-education-card description 'cute cartoon style', topics include 'cartoon'; template-mbti-contrast aliases include '卡通风格'.

queries.rationale: True content gap: Chiikawa is a specific licensed kawaii franchise no template generates; bigram '卡哇' only surfaces generic kawaii inspirations (intent mismatch). Honest no-route is the gold.
queries.evidence: No KB template carries Chiikawa/吉伊卡哇 in samples or aliases; only generic kawaii character-card templates exist.

queries.rationale: 'Home decoration' names interior-decor subject; both seeds carry the literal '家居装饰' alias; houseplant-care-guide is a decor-adjacent fit.
queries.evidence: template-interior-design-mood-board-generator aliases include '家居装饰','室内装饰'.

queries.rationale: 'Engineering' fits industrial-design (engineering blueprints, '工程草图/工程图' aliases) and career-field (Industrial Engineering). Dropped seed mbti-siliconvalley (generates MBTI personas of tech founders, not engineering).
queries.evidence: template-industrial-design-concept-sketch aliases '工业设计','工程草图'; career-field samples 'Industrial Engineering'.

queries.rationale: Bare domain noun 'plants' with multiple valid plant-subject routes. species-science covers plant species, herbal medicinal plants, gardening plant care.
queries.evidence: template-species-science samples 'ginkgo tree','golden camellia', aliases '植物学'.

queries.rationale: 'Fruits Chinese' = bilingual fruit vocabulary; vocabulary generates en-zh 'Fruits' cards directly; cuisine-food-vocab covers the fruit subject. expected='empty' is a tokenization bug, not a true content gap.
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary samples include 'Fruits' and language_pair 'en-zh'; aliases 'chinese-english','中英对照'.

queries.rationale: 'E-commerce detail image' names subject and artifact precisely; fashion-ecommerce generates e-commerce detail-page long images; product-poster/product-theme-promotional are adjacent commercial visuals.
queries.evidence: template-fashion-ecommerce description 'suitable for e-commerce detail pages'; aliases '电商','e-commerce'.

queries.rationale: 'Bicycle' has dedicated bike content post-2026-05-20 batch: object-structure-labeling (mountain/road-bike anatomy labels), vocabulary (en-zh/en-fr cycling vocab), travel-packing-guide (cycling tour packing). Subject clear, format implied -> medium.
queries.evidence: template-bilingual-object-structure-labeling param object_name with bike/anatomy samples; template-vocabulary has en-zh/en-fr cycling word cards.

queries.rationale: 'Wine' has a dedicated wine-variety template (red/white wine, tasting notes); lifestyle-info-card has explicit '葡萄酒品鉴'; regional-alcoholic-drinks is the regional alcohol route.
queries.evidence: template-wine-variety-intro-infographic samples 'Red Wine','White Wine','Champagne'; lifestyle-info-card alias '葡萄酒品鉴'.

queries.rationale: 'Vegetables' generated directly as a vocab theme and a gardening subject. Dropped seed word-scene (generates labeled scenes, not a vegetables subject card).
queries.evidence: template-kids-vocabulary-poster samples 'vegetables', alias '蔬菜'; gardening-how-to samples 'carrots','lettuce','tomatoes'.

queries.rationale: Bare 'vocabulary' domain word; gold is a set of word-card routes. vocabulary is canonical; kids-vocabulary-poster and language-word-comparison are dedicated vocab posters; mbti-animal qualifies via animal-vocab aliases.
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary title 'Bilingual Vocabulary Visual Guide'; kids-vocabulary-poster alias '词汇学习'.

queries.rationale: 'Interesting economics knowledge popularization' is a science/knowledge-popularization infographic; education-card turns any topic into a Chinese 科普 card; hotspot-card covers knowledge cards. No economics-specific template exists (open gap).
queries.evidence: template-education-card description 'Turn an input topic into a Chinese educational infographic', aliases '科学知识','信息图'.

queries.rationale: 'Music' served directly by music-style infographic (jazz/kpop/rock); vocabulary covers 'Musical Instruments'. Dropped seed movie-poster (subject is films, not music).
queries.evidence: template-music-style-visual-infographic samples 'jazz musician','kpop idol','rock star', aliases '音乐海报'.

queries.rationale: Bare 'food' domain word with many valid food routes. cuisine-food-vocab and vocabulary cover food vocab, food is a culinary science panorama, bilingual-object-structure-labeling labels foods.
queries.evidence: template-cuisine-food-vocab-poster description 'bilingual food vocabulary posters'; bilingual-object-structure-labeling samples 'Hamburger','Pepperoni Pizza'.

queries.rationale: 'Aromatherapy/scented candle' covered by 4 dedicated examples: product-poster (aroma diffuser), soft-decoration & interior-design (aromatherapy spa space), lifestyle-info-card (essential oils).
queries.evidence: template-product-poster samples 'aroma diffuser'; soft-decoration aliases '香薰','精油','aromatherapy'.

queries.rationale: Subject is a historical person; multiple dedicated historical-figure routes exist. figure-principles takes a single famous_figure (Einstein, da Vinci) matching 'historical · character_name'.
queries.evidence: template-figure-principles-infographic param [famous_figure], samples 'albert einstein','leonardo da vinci'.

queries.rationale: 'Future characters' maps to sci-fi/AI/tech personas; mbti-siliconvalley generates AI-model and tech-founder characters; custom-character-card builds archetype/cinematic cards. No dedicated sci-fi character generator exists.
queries.evidence: template-mbti-siliconvalley samples 'ChatGPT','Claude','Gemini', topics include 'ai'.

queries.rationale: Capability override of the note's gap claim: english-grammar-wordlist-infographic explicitly generates homophone/homonym word-pair infographics (samples literally '20 common homophones'/'20 common homonyms'). homograph poster is near-miss (same spelling, not sound).
queries.evidence: template-english-grammar-wordlist-infographic description 'homophones, homonyms, confusing word pairs'; samples '20 common homonyms','20 common homophones 1'.

queries.rationale: Bilingual en-zh tag slug; gold is a set of templates with explicit english-chinese language_pair capability. vocabulary is canonical; word-scene, bilingual labeling, language-word-comparison all carry en-zh.
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary param language_pair sample 'en-zh', aliases 'english-chinese','中英对照'.

queries.rationale: Broad language-learning domain phrase resolving to a set of phrase/idiom/expression learning-card templates; native-english-expressions is the most literal fit. Antonym seeds are off-subject for 'expressions'.
queries.evidence: template-native-english-expressions title 'Native English Expressions Posters'; phrasal-verb/top5-phrases generate idiom/phrase cards.

queries.rationale: Bare polysemous phrase routed to clean country/culture-themed templates per the post-prune intent; universe-specific MBTI templates correctly excluded as off-subject.
queries.evidence: template-national-culture-history-infographic samples 'china, france, italy, japan, united kingdom'.

queries.rationale: Travel-destination domain phrase covered by the travel map / destination / itinerary family; primary is the canonical travel map generator.
queries.evidence: template-country-top10-travel-destinations title 'Country Top 10 Travel Destinations Poster'; template-travel 'Hand-drawn Travel Map Generator'.

queries.rationale: Note claims a content gap, but by capability cultural-travel-journey-infographic generates cultural-experience content (cultural immersion / maori cultural experience), so it is a genuine single route.
queries.evidence: template-cultural-travel-journey-infographic alias 'cultural immersion', samples 'maori cultural experience','japanese tea ceremony'.

queries.rationale: Intent is short city itineraries/getaways; series-travel (daily trip plans) and best-cities-travel fit. Architectural 3D-model hits are the flagged intent mismatch (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-series-travel title 'AI Travel Itinerary Planner (Daily Plans)'; best-cities-travel-infographic = best-cities guide.

queries.rationale: Recipe/cuisine/comfort-food family; cuisine-food-vocab-poster carries the exact 'creative comfort food' alias making it the best route.
queries.evidence: template-cuisine-food-vocab-poster aliases include 'comfort food' and 'creative comfort food'.

queries.rationale: 'Beautiful spring' -> watercolor floral/garden aesthetic templates; herbal correctly dropped as off-intent medicinal. Flower-card and gardening best deliver spring-flower visuals.
queries.evidence: CVC flower-card and gardening-how-to render plant/flower watercolor; note lists country-souvenirs-watercolor + CVC-flower-card + gardening as top.

queries.rationale: Content gap: no template generates ID/passport-photo or portrait-retouching output. The 16 post-topup hits are a CJK-bigram matcher artifact, not real capability, so honest gold is no route.
queries.evidence: Full-KB scan for 证件/id-photo/passport/headshot/retouch surfaces no portrait-retouching template.

queries.rationale: 'Handcraft/handmade' resolves to the intangible-heritage craft board; the multilingual-vocabulary seed correctly dropped as off-subject (vocab, not craft).
queries.evidence: template-intangible-heritage aliases 手工艺/手工制作/craftsmanship/paper craft, sample 'paper cutting'.

queries.rationale: Exact subject+format match to the dedicated Marvel MBTI template.
queries.evidence: template-mbti-marvel 'MBTI Marvel Superhero Infographic Generator', ex=66.

queries.rationale: Watercolor + gardening floral templates; herbal correctly dropped per prune. Gardening and flower-card directly render spring flowers.
queries.evidence: template-gardening-how-to-infographic 'Gardening DIY Visual Guide'; CVC flower-card = flower cards.

queries.rationale: 'Antonyms' is a linguistic-opposites query; the two opposite-word templates fit. mbti-contrast correctly dropped (personality opposites != antonyms).
queries.evidence: template-chinese-verb-opposite-infographic 'Chinese Verb Opposites: Learn Antonym Pairs'.

queries.rationale: Paper cutting is a core sample of the intangible-heritage craft board; clothing-evolution-poster seed is off-subject and dropped.
queries.evidence: template-intangible-heritage sample_param_values include 'paper cutting', aliases jianzhi/kirigami/剪纸.

queries.rationale: Red-carpet/couture fashion query; the two templates carrying explicit met-gala/red-carpet/couture aliases truly fit.
queries.evidence: fashion-inspired-gown-design-sheet and ai-outfit-try-on-poster aliases include met gala / red carpet / couture / 红毯.

queries.rationale: 'Animal + vocabulary' -> bilingual vocab posters/flashcards; vocab parent re-added via animal-topic filter. Kids watercolor vocab poster is the cleanest animal-vocab fit.
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary sample topics include 'Farm Animals'; kids-vocabulary-poster = bilingual watercolor kids vocab.

queries.rationale: Content gap: no template generates wedding-planning/celebration content. The vocab-parent hit was a heterogeneous false positive; remaining matches are off-subject, so honest gold is no route.
queries.evidence: Full-KB scan for wedding/婚礼/bride/marriage surfaces no wedding-subject generator; expected_templates='empty'.

queries.query: minimalist autumn outfit for japan travel
queries.rationale: Outfit-for-travel long-tail; travel-packing-guide best angles 'autumn outfit for japan travel', with outfit-breakdown/style-variation as alternates. Gown-design-sheet (couture) is off-intent for minimalist travel outfits.
queries.evidence: template-travel-packing-guide-infographic 'Travel Packing Visual Guide'; outfit-breakdown renders outfit components.

queries.query: infj vs entp dating compatibility chart
queries.rationale: MBTI dating-compatibility query; the dedicated compatibility template is the most literal fit, with relationship/in-love/comparison as valid alternates.
queries.evidence: template-mbti-personality-compatibility-infographic 'MBTI Personality Compatibility Infographic'.

queries.rationale: Clear dish+recipe-poster intent; recipe is canonical and varieties-food-poster explicitly does sandwiches.
queries.evidence: template-varieties-food-poster samples 'Classic American Sandwiches, World Sandwiches'; recipe = recipe posters.

queries.query: bilingual flashcards for kids learning korean fruits
queries.rationale: Bilingual kids vocab flashcards for korean fruits; canonical vocabulary supports en-ko + Fruits exactly, with kids/cartoon variants as alternates.
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary sample values include 'en-ko' and 'Fruits'.

queries.query: watercolor map of europe travel destinations
queries.rationale: Subject is a watercolor continent map of Europe with destinations; watercolor-world-map-illustration is the continent-level watercolor map. Whimsical-travel-map is per-country, journal-collage is expedition-theme (adjacent).
queries.evidence: template-watercolor-world-map-illustration samples include 'europe', param continent_name.

queries.rationale: houseplant-care-guide-infographic is an exact match (watering/soil/light care) with a monstera example. gardening-how-to covers edible-plant growing steps, not decorative houseplant care (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-houseplant-care-guide-infographic samples include 'monstera' (and pothos, snake plant), param plant_name.

queries.rationale: A 16-type MBTI chart themed to Marvel: mbti-generic generates the full 16-type chart with a 'Marvel' character_set; mbti-marvel maps types onto Marvel heroes. fandom-grid is a 3x3 poster, not a 16-type chart (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-mbti-generic samples include 'Marvel'; mbti-marvel samples are Marvel heroes.

queries.query: lunar new year red envelope graphic design
queries.rationale: A dedicated lunar-new-year-red-envelope-set template now ships (the note's 'no example yet' is stale), directly generating festive red-envelope design sets.
queries.evidence: template-lunar-new-year-red-envelope-set aliases 'lunar new year','新年红包','红包设计'; samples 'Dragon Year Red Envelopes'.

queries.rationale: Content gap: no template honestly generates a 1950s diner SCENE illustration/retro poster. nostalgic-first-item makes object-collection posters, watercolor-theme-collage makes seasonal mood collages, vintage-travel-scrapbook makes destination scrapbooks — all subject-mismatched.
queries.evidence: No KB template carries a diner/1950s-scene sample; nostalgic-first-item samples are gadgets (camera, tv).

queries.rationale: Exact canonical match: home-organization-before-after generates before/after organization posters and includes kitchen examples. Narrow but precise.
queries.evidence: template-home-organization-before-after samples include 'Kitchen Counter' and literal 'before after kitchen organization makeover'.

queries.rationale: Phonics for kindergarten covered by phonics-consonant-blend (50 examples); kids-vocabulary-poster serves early-learner printables. The note's 'empty' is about the 'worksheets' format token, not the subject.
queries.evidence: template-phonics-consonant-blend description 'phonics learning poster', topics 'beginner','language-english'.

queries.rationale: Subject is Spanish vocabulary; template-vocabulary supports the en-es language pair explicitly. Kids/cartoon flashcards are English-Chinese only — subject-mismatched for Spanish (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-vocabulary samples include 'en-es', desc 'any topic and language pair (en-zh, en-es, ...)'.

queries.rationale: ESL = English-as-second-language flashcards; cartoon-english-vocabulary-flashcards generates kids' English vocab flashcards; template-vocabulary makes bilingual cards for any topic. verb-action-learning-cards is verb-specific (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-cartoon-english-vocabulary-flashcards desc 'English vocabulary flashcards'; vocabulary topics include 'flashcards'.

queries.rationale: Content gap: recipe templates generate a single named-dish poster, not an adjective-named, multi-recipe 'easy/healthy weeknight dinners' collection.
queries.evidence: template-recipe param dish_name single-dish samples; premium-recipe-card single recipe_name — no collection artifact.

queries.rationale: Content gap: 'gluten free dinner ideas' is a dietary-collection concept; recipe templates make single-dish posters and dessert-color-lab is a themed dessert grid — none generate a gluten-free dinner-idea collection.
queries.evidence: recipe/premium-recipe-card take a single dish/recipe name (no dietary-collection samples).

queries.rationale: Content gap: meal-prep weekly planning is a multi-recipe schedule artifact; recipe templates each generate one dish/recipe poster — no weekly meal-plan template exists.
queries.evidence: template-recipe param dish_name (single dish); food-recipe-tip is split-screen cooking tips.

queries.rationale: A cozy-reading aesthetic vibe is served by cozy watercolor lifestyle/mood templates. self-help-book summarizes a book's content, not an aesthetic (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-lifestyle-watercolor-infographic desc 'cozy lifestyle infographic ... self-care', aliases 'aesthetic'; watercolor-theme-collage sample 'cozy winter tea'.

queries.rationale: Subject is books for a gift guide; book-recommendation-grid-poster generates a book grid; top10-visual-guide can do a Top 10 book-genres list. country-souvenirs-watercolor matches the gift-guide layout but subject is souvenirs, not books (near-miss).
queries.evidence: template-book-recommendation-grid-poster desc 'book recommendation poster ... 16 book cards'; top10-visual-guide sample 'Top 10 Book Genres'.

queries.rationale: Bare niche-fandom noun with several valid formats post-topup: fandom-character-grid (cast grid), mbti-generic (MBTI chart), pop-culture-matching (zodiac chart) all carry Chiikawa examples.
queries.evidence: template-fandom-character-grid-poster samples 'Chiikawa','Chiikawa and Friends Main Cast'; mbti-generic alias 'chiikawa'.

queries.rationale: Bare subject noun with multiple valid routes after the fandom topup: fandom-grid (samurai grids), mbti-generic / pop-culture (anime-samurai), historical-figure-profile (legendary samurai & battles).
queries.evidence: template-fandom-character-grid-poster samples 'Famous Samurai of Japan','Female Samurai (Onna-bugeisha)', aliases 'samurai','武士'.

queries.rationale: Bare game-fandom noun with several valid routes after topup: fandom-grid (region character grids), mbti-generic (by-element MBTI), pop-culture (Archons chart) all carry Genshin examples.
queries.evidence: template-fandom-character-grid-poster samples 'Genshin Impact','Genshin Impact — Liyue Region Characters'.

queries.rationale: Broad polysemous single noun; gold is a set of core map-generating templates. whimsical-travel-map is the most generic illustrated map route, with 3d-region-landmark, world-travel-map, watercolor-world-map rounding out the family.
queries.evidence: These templates carry template_topics 'map' and are illustrated/geographic map generators.
